ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region within the continent */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the indicator measures */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator (e.g., percentage, number) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_pillars" (
  "sub_pillar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-pillar */,
  "sub_pillar_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-pillar */,
  "sub_pillar_description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-pillar */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_pillar_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_sub_pillars" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator */,
  "sub_pillar_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-pillar */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id", "sub_pillar_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the metric is associated with */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the metric corresponds to */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator measured */,
  "data_col" REAL /* Actual data collected for the indicator */,
  "new_rank_score" REAL /* Rank score calculated for the country */,
  "higher_is_better" INTEGER /* Indicator if higher values are better */,
  "sub_pillar_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-pillar related to the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rank entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country being ranked */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the ranking corresponds to */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking score of the country */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator used for ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ranks_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ranks_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ranks_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_sources" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id", "source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update record */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in the update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, update) */,
  "resource_accessed" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user (e.g., report, metric) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
